name: LINDE PLC
summary: Linde plc is the largest industrial gas company worldwide, producing and distributing atmospheric gases (oxygen, nitrogen, argon, rare gases) and process gases (hydrogen, helium, carbon dioxide, carbon monoxide, electronic gases, specialty gases, acetylene). The company also designs and builds industrial gas production plants including air separation, hydrogen, olefin, and natural gas plants. Linde serves healthcare, chemicals, energy, manufacturing, metals, mining, food and beverage, and electronics industries, with approximately 64% of 2025 sales outside the United States.

products.name: Oxygen
products.description: Atmospheric gas produced via cryogenic or non-cryogenic air separation for industrial and medical use.

products.name: Nitrogen
products.description: Atmospheric gas produced via air separation, distributed on-site, merchant bulk, or packaged cylinders.

products.name: Argon
products.description: Atmospheric gas produced as part of cryogenic air separation process.

products.name: Hydrogen
products.description: Process gas produced via SMR, ATR, or electrolysis; includes conventional, low-carbon (blue), and renewable (green) variants.

products.name: Helium
products.description: Sourced from helium-rich natural gas streams in the US and internationally, distributed in bulk and cylinders.

products.name: Carbon Dioxide
products.description: Sourced as industrial by-product, purified to commercial and food-grade quality.

products.name: Carbon Monoxide
products.description: Produced via SMR or ATR of natural gas or naphtha feedstock.

products.name: Acetylene
products.description: Sourced as chemical by-product or produced from calcium carbide and water.

products.name: Specialty Gases and Mixtures
products.description: Wide range of specialty gases and mixtures distributed in cylinders for various industries.

products.name: Rare Gases (Krypton, Neon, Xenon)
products.description: Produced as part of cryogenic air separation process.

products.name: Air Separation Plants
products.description: Engineered plants designed and built by Linde for production of atmospheric gases.

products.name: Hydrogen and Synthesis Gas Plants
products.description: Engineered plants for hydrogen and synthesis gas production sold to customers or operated by Linde.

products.name: Olefin and Natural Gas Plants
products.description: Engineered processing plants for petrochemical and natural gas industries.

products.name: VPSA Technology
products.description: Vacuum pressure swing adsorption technology for on-site production of gaseous oxygen and nitrogen.

products.name: Membrane Separation Technology
products.description: Non-cryogenic technology for on-site production of gaseous oxygen and nitrogen.

products.name: Digital Services and Solutions
products.description: Digital offerings to increase plant efficiency and performance for engineering customers.
